calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Aug-24-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name for 2 minors.
Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, CSR: Angie Diner
Petitioners Maria del Carmen Flores and Leonardo Torres appeared in proper and was sworn and examined.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing. It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of 2 Minors FROM:
AIDAN JAVIER FLORES TO AIDAN JAVIER SERRANO FLORES AND
IRIS FLORES TO IRIS SERRANO FLORES
Decree signed in open court.
